# Adirat Formation

**Summary**: An Early Jurassic formation consisting of quartzitic and micaccous sandstones.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] analyzed the adirat-formation as a basal unit of the Jurassic rocks in Northern Somalia.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] fluvial to marine-littoral

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The thickness at the type section is about 200 meters but decreases to the South. ([[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993, p. 25]])
